description_long: This is a rectangular table with a rich, dark wooden top featuring natural grain patterns and a smooth finish. The tabletop is supported by four sturdy, black metal legs, each with a wide, square base for stability. The legs are positioned at the corners, providing ample legroom and a modern industrial aesthetic. The table's design is minimalistic, with clean lines and no visible decorative elements or attachments. Its robust construction suggests it is suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments, such as parks, patios, or communal spaces. The materials and build indicate durability and resistance to heavy use.
description: A rectangular table with a dark wooden top and four black metal legs, featuring a modern, minimalistic design.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the narrow width of the wooden tabletop and two black metal legs.
description_view_1: Full frontal view displaying the rectangular tabletop and all four black metal legs.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, similar to view 0, highlighting the tabletop's thickness and leg placement.
description_view_3: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the tabletop and all four legs from the opposite side.
